name: mateclaw-plugin-mem0
description: Bridges MateClaw's memory system to a self-hosted Mem0 service. Adds semantic recall from Mem0 alongside the built-in local memory providers. Requires a separately deployed Mem0 service (FastAPI + pgvector). Not part of the default stack.
author: MateClaw Team

baseUrl.description: Mem0 REST API base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8080

apiKey.description: Optional bearer token sent as Authorization header to Mem0

searchEnabled.description: Enable semantic recall via Mem0 /memories/search/. Default true.

syncEnabled.description: Enable pushing each turn to Mem0 /memories/. Default true.

maxResults.description: Max number of memories returned per recall. Default 5.

timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds for both recall and sync. Default 3000.
